title: brodys smp essentials and stuff
description: Crystal faster and get better at SMP minecraft servers instantly!
body: This modpack gives you everything from FPS increasing Mods to Crystal Tweaks, you get Voice chat to communicate with others on big servers. In addition, 'Litematica' helps you build great bases and Farms, wich gives you great opportunities to climb the leaderboards on every SMP out there! Every rendering and performance mod there is, is installed. You can customise your gaming experience by giving your sky a new look with 'fabric sky boxes'. I hope this will make your SMP gaming experience better and more exciting. Peace out, Brody
